scripts.check: node ../scripts/run-biome.mjs check src vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts playwright.benchmark.config.ts e2e
scripts.format: node ../scripts/run-biome.mjs format --write src vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts playwright.benchmark.config.ts e2e
scripts.test:e2e: cargo run --offline --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml --bin nettle-make-fixture -- /tmp/nettle-browser-fixture.nettle && cargo run --offline --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml --bin nettle-make-fixture -- /tmp/nettle-shift-register-fixture.nettle --shift-register && cargo run --offline --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml --bin nettle-make-fixture -- /tmp/nettle-comparison-reference.nettle --comparison-reference && cargo run --offline --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml --bin nettle-make-fixture -- /tmp/nettle-comparison-candidate.nettle --comparison-candidate && playwright test e2e/app.spec.ts --workers=1 && node ../scripts/run-netlist-e2e.mjs
